Title: Authorizes Cong Ahavas Yisrael, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
Summary: Authorizes the Cong Ahavas Yisrael, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status for the 2026 assessment roll and all of the 2025-2026 school taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the Cong Ahavas Yisrael, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
